research_question: In adult patients admitted to the intensive care unit (ICU), does the administration of melatonin for the promotion of night-time sleep, compared to no agent or another sleep-promoting agent, improve the quantity and quality of sleep (subjective and objective) and reduce anxiety, depression, mortality, ICU length of stay, and adverse events?
